data.body: MILESTONE: A3 (34b1) + C2 (c244) both CLOSED + completion-signed. Gerrit 424 (A3) and 432 (C2) both fully green (Verified+1, LLM-Review+1), ready to submit — holding for full-stack submission. A3 included the live remediation (2422 SNAPSHOT_INCONSISTENT -> 0). C2 = hard-delete->outbound re-create (reason-key fix + applier injection + bind_confirm stale-reverse + module-size relocation + 12 tests). B1 (a118) plan advanced 4 rounds + deferred (3+hr live operational gates). 9622 plan re-review round 2 running (non-breaking retry-aware approach). Remaining: 9622, D1, eca4 + B1 operational.
